description: Governed x402 payment sessions: pay any endpoint with budget, allowlist & per-tx caps, no key.
name: io.github.nirholas/agentcore-payments-mcp

environmentVariables.description: Your three.ws session token (value of the `__Host-sid` cookie from a signed-in browser). Required for account management operations: create_payment_session, list_payment_sessions, check_payment_session, cancel_payment_session.
environmentVariables.name: THREE_WS_SESSION

environmentVariables.description: A payment session bearer token (starts with 'pss_') from create_payment_session. Used by the agent for pay_with_session calls when no inline token is passed. Treat like a spending card — it authorizes payments up to the session's budget.
environmentVariables.name: PAYMENT_SESSION_TOKEN

environmentVariables.description: Base URL of the three.ws API. Override only when self-hosting or targeting a preview deployment.
environmentVariables.name: THREE_WS_BASE

environmentVariables.description: Per-request HTTP timeout in milliseconds. x402 payments involve on-chain settlement so this should be generous (default: 30000).
environmentVariables.name: THREE_WS_TIMEOUT_MS

title: three.ws Agent Payments
